user_message: Can you work with me on consumption trend for Azure Ridge Partners? Multiple stakeholders are involved -- it's complex.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 11:59 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Azure Ridge Partners

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 13:04 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our CFO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Thomas Okafor <thomas.okafor@azureridgepa.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-01 15:53 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Azure Ridge Partners

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Azure Ridge Partners: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF37-I trap (Invents customer impact numbers not in source); produces complete Severity triage, root-cause hypothesis (labeled as hypothesis), customer response draft, ACR risk fl
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF37-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF37-I failure mode (Invents customer impact numbers not in source)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF37-I -- Invents customer impact numbers not in source
